ConnectionStrings._comment_pooler: Pooler connection (Port=6543) can cause connection exhaustion. Using direct connection (Port=5432) with proper pool settings instead.
ConnectionStrings._comment_supabase: Currently using Supabase PostgreSQL direct connection. Pooling configured: Max 20 connections, 30s timeout, 300s idle lifetime.

RedisSettings._comment: Set Enabled=true and provide Upstash Redis connection string to enable Redis caching in development. When Enabled=false, application uses database-only fallback mode.

AzureOpenAI._comment: Development Azure OpenAI endpoint. Use .NET User Secrets for ApiKey: dotnet user-secrets set 'AzureOpenAI:ApiKey' 'your-key-here'
